target: 4. Hero of Justice…?

(After parting ways with Mio Kofune and Tokiko Hishigata,
the two arrived here—)

Touchaaku!
This is the secret base of the Hero of Justice!

I thought it might be something, but it's just a police station.
A completely open and public service facility—nothing secretive at all…

Tetsu-san!
Ahh, there you are!
Hm… who are you?

Good to see you!
This is Hoine Minakata!

Oh, it's Hoine-chan!
You came here!

Reporting!
The island is peaceful today!

Oh, that's good.
Good patrol work.
Hehehe!

Hey, Hoine.
Is this guy the "Hero of Justice"?

Yes!
He's the Hero of Justice who protects the island's safety!
Huh? Hnnn!?
(…His gaze is obviously directed at my chest. Doesn't he even try to hide it? Scoundrel!)

Uh, Hoine-chan?
This person…

Hizuru-chan!
She's Papa's older sister!
I'm showing Hizuru-chan around the island right now!
Ah, that's the guy from Ryunosuke-kun's…

The older sister of Ryunosuke Minakata,
Hizuru Minakata.
…H-cup.
Huh?
Ah…

Ah, no, no!
I didn't say anything at all!
Ah, ha ha ha!
…A typical lowlife.

In a story, I could at least tolerate him,
but in the real world, I've confirmed he's extremely annoying.
…What!?

If he faced a real crisis,
he'd run away first, tail between his legs—
that's the kind of guy he is, right?
…What, what!?

But rest assured.
A story isn't made up of only brave warriors.
People like you are also necessary.
…What, what, what!?

You're committing defamation!
I'll report you!

Also!
I'm a G-cup, not an H-cup!
What, what, what, what!?
Hizuru-chan, what's a "cup size"?

A unit for measuring chest size.
You'll understand when you grow up.
Huh, so big…

Hoine, the Hero of Justice is over.
Show me the next place.
Yes! Bye, Tetsu-san!
O, okay…

This is utterly pointless.
Calling oneself a Hero of Justice like that is disgraceful.
But Tetsu-san, you're fun to play with, right?

Playing with children isn't the job of the Hero of Justice.
That's a serious case of negligence.

But… if he has time for that,
it means the island is peaceful, right?

Yeah!
It's peaceful today too!
…Yeah.

(Not everything visible is real.
Through my reporting so far, I've felt this deeply)

(A seemingly peaceful rural area
can often be a microcosm of a tense, surveilled society)

(There are always two sides to things,
and people are no exception)

(However…
this island seems genuinely safe)
(I thought it was just my bias because I was born here…)
(That Tetsu is working as the island's police officer—)

(It's safe to say that this fact speaks volumes
about how peaceful this island is)
Hey, Hizuru-chan!
What?

If you just stand around here,
let's go to the next place soon!
I want to show you more!
Ah…

(I wasn't just standing around.
But kids don't have time to think, I guess)
Come on, this way!
Okay, okay.
